evidence_paragraphs.snippet: When [Devan](wiki:Devan_Seaworth) asks her what she sees, she replies with her usual answer "Much and more." She does not let him know how difficult it is or how much pain she endures to try and see...

When [Devan](wiki:Devan_Seaworth) asks her what she sees, she replies with her usual answer "Much and more." She does not let him know how difficult it is or how much pain she endures to try and see...

[Melisandre](wiki:Melisandre) is in her chambers, looking into the fire and trying to receive her visions. When she looks for Stannis, she sees eyeless faces staring out, crying blood. Then she sees...
